overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exploring an outdoor amphitheater surrounded by tropical vegetation. The character walks across grass fields, stone seating, and narrow paths around the historic stone structure on a bright sunny day.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across grass field toward the amphitheater structure

entered.detail: large dark rectangular stage structure with geometric facade
dense palm trees and banana plants surrounding the area
open grassy area with scattered white flowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a sunny grass field toward a large outdoor amphitheater. The stone seating and dark stage structure are visible ahead, surrounded by lush tropical vegetation.

events.description: character steps from grass onto stone amphitheater seating

agents.ego_description: walking up the curved stone steps of the amphitheater seating

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone steps of the amphitheater, moving through the tiered seating area. The stage structure shifts to the left as the character climbs higher on the curved stone benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy area with scattered trees beyond amphitheater

events.description: exits stone seating onto dirt path and grass

agents.ego_description: walking down from the amphitheater onto a dirt path through grassy terrain

entered.detail: worn dirt trail winding through grass

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the stone seating onto a dirt path cutting through grassy terrain. The amphitheater falls behind as the character moves toward a more wooded area with scattered trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded tree corridor leading to building

events.description: enters shaded narrow passage between dense trees and walls

agents.ego_description: walking through a shaded corridor of trees toward a building

entered.detail: long single-story building with red and beige walls
shaded passage lined with palm trees and stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shaded, narrow corridor densely packed with tropical trees. A long building with red-trimmed walls becomes visible ahead as the character moves through the dappled light.

events.description: emerges from tree corridor into open area alongside building wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the building exterior and turning back toward the amphitheater

entered.detail: textured wall surface with red painted lower section

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the building's exterior wall, then turns to reveal the amphitheater stage in the distance. The environment opens up again as the character moves along the paved walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, sunny field through the tiered architecture of an amphitheater and into a shaded tropical corridor. It begins with the character walking across a bright grass field toward the stone seating and dark stage of the amphitheater, surrounded by lush vegetation. As the character ascends the curved stone steps, the perspective shifts, moving higher through the tiered seating before descending onto a dirt path that leads away from the structure. The scene then transitions into a narrow, shaded corridor densely packed with tropical trees and dappled light, eventually revealing a long building with red-trimmed walls. Finally, the camera follows the character along the building's exterior wall and a paved walkway, where the environment opens up to reveal the amphitheater stage in the distance.
